steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to specify how long Mozambique officially used the escudo. That requires stating both when the escudo became official (1914) and when it was replaced (1980).

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "Countries sometimes adopt new currency systems, as Mozambique did when it replaced the escudo with the metical.": makes a general point about currency adoption; gives no dates for the escudo’s duration. ✗
  • The metical-focused alternative, the country's former official currency was introduced in 1914.": gives only the start date; never says when the escudo ended. ✗
  • "The escudo was Mozambique's official currency from 1914 to 1980.": states both dates and directly specifies the complete duration. ✓
  • "The metical has been Mozambique's official currency since 1980, when it replaced the escudo.": focuses on the metical, not the escudo, and omits the escudo’s start date. ✗
That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
